title: hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolineolatum
intro: Hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolineolatum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolineolatum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
